raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 1.0,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want feedback primarily on the research ideas (contribution, novelty, and framing) or on the writing itself (clarity, grammar, and flow)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The open-ended request invites feedback on the framing of the core contribution and its significance.",
    "R1.2": "Evaluating the logical flow of the argument presented in the abstract is a key part of assessing the work.",
    "R1.4": "The request to 'think' about a research abstract makes assessing the claimed novelty a load-bearing responsibility.",
    "R1.5": "The general nature of the request includes evaluating the narrative structure and flow of the abstract itself.",
    "R1.6": "Feedback on writing clarity, conciseness, and style is a central component of a general review.",
    "RX.1": "I must be clear that my feedback is based solely on the abstract and not the full paper.",
    "RX.2": "My assessment must be balanced and avoid making exaggerated claims about the work's strengths or weaknesses.",
    "RX.3": "The response must adhere strictly to the content of the provided abstract.",
    "RX.4": "A responsible review of this AI research requires considering potential downstream societal harms or misuse.",
    "RX.5": "All feedback provided must be directly traceable to specific statements within the artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want feedback primarily on the research ideas (contribution, novelty, and framing) or on the writing itself (clarity, grammar, and flow)?

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites feedback on the framing of the core contribution and its significance.
rationale.R1.2: Evaluating the logical flow of the argument presented in the abstract is a key part of assessing the work.
rationale.R1.4: The request to 'think' about a research abstract makes assessing the claimed novelty a load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: The general nature of the request includes evaluating the narrative structure and flow of the abstract itself.
rationale.R1.6: Feedback on writing clarity, conciseness, and style is a central component of a general review.
rationale.RX.1: I must be clear that my feedback is based solely on the abstract and not the full paper.
rationale.RX.2: My assessment must be balanced and avoid making exaggerated claims about the work's strengths or weaknesses.
rationale.RX.3: The response must adhere strictly to the content of the provided abstract.
rationale.RX.4: A responsible review of this AI research requires considering potential downstream societal harms or misuse.
rationale.RX.5: All feedback provided must be directly traceable to specific statements within the artifact.
